# SG Postal Code Directory
> Singapore's most complete postal code directory with 141,726 verified addresses and 121,361 unique postal codes.

## What this site provides
- Individual pages for every Singapore postal code (6-digit format)
- Full address details: building name, block number, road name, Singapore postal code
- GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude) for each address
- Google Maps and Apple Maps integration
- Nearby postal codes within 500 metres using Haversine distance
- Browse by district (D01–D91) and by road name (3,867 roads)
- Full-text search across the entire database

## Data Source
All data is sourced from Singapore Land Authority (SLA) OneMap — the authoritative Singapore government geographic information system.
Data is processed at build time for instant, no-loading-spinner delivery.

## URL Structure
- Home: https://www.sgpostalcode.com/
- Postal code: https://www.sgpostalcode.com/postal/{6-digit-code}/
- District: https://www.sgpostalcode.com/district/{district-id}/
- Road: https://www.sgpostalcode.com/road/{road-slug}/
- Search: https://www.sgpostalcode.com/search/?q={query}

## Coverage
- Total records: 141,726
- Unique postal codes: 121,361
- Postal districts: 84 active (codes 01–91 with gaps)
- Roads: 3,867 named roads
- Country: Singapore (SG)

## Sitemap
https://www.sgpostalcode.com/sitemap.xml

## API / Data Access
For programmatic access to Singapore postal code data, refer to:
- SLA OneMap API: https://www.onemap.gov.sg/apidocs/
- data.gov.sg: https://data.gov.sg

## Contact
https://www.sgpostalcode.com/contact/
